calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Substitutiing Successor In Interest For Deceased Pltf And For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Luke VanderDrift (415)504-2165 for PLAINTIFFs ERIC CLEVELAND and WENDY MORTENSON the moving party/ No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFs ERIC CLEVELAND and WENDY MORTENSON's Motion For Substituting Successor In Interest For Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file Second Amended Complaint forthwith. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Eric Cleveland'S Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions Agaainst Deft In The Amount Of $1940
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Stephen N. Ilg, Esq. of Tobener Law Center appearing for ERIC CLEVELAND, and WENDY MORTENSON, plaintiffs and moving parties / No other appearances.

There being no opposition, the Court adopts its tentative decision. Plaintiffs ERIC CLEVELAND and WENDY MORTENSON Motion to Compel Responses to Eric Cleveland's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories Set One; Request For Production of Documents, Set One is GRANTED. Request for Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant in the Amount of $1940 is DENIED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
